faq.question: What should homeowners know about Simonton Pro?
faq.answer: Simonton Pro is part of Simonton's lineup: low-maintenance vinyl collections including DaylightMax with slim frames. Deluxe Windows checks that this collection matches the opening sizes and design goals before recommending it.

faq.question: Which configurations does Simonton Pro offer?
faq.answer: Styles, sizes, glass packages, colors and hardware for Simonton Pro depend on the current catalog. Deluxe Windows confirms available configurations for each Bay Area order.

faq.question: How is installed pricing for Simonton Pro calculated?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for Simonton Pro reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $499 per window installed (regular $832).

faq.question: How does Simonton Pro compare with other Simonton collections?
faq.answer: Compare Simonton Pro with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. Simonton has been an ENERGY STAR partner since 1999.

faq.question: How do I order Simonton Pro with installation?
faq.answer: Ordering Simonton Pro starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.
